codes.message: External variant identity matches one existing retailer mapping.
codes.remediation: Validate all supporting identity and expected state.

codes.message: External product identity matches one known retailer family.
codes.remediation: Resolve the exact sellable variant.

codes.message: GTIN uniquely matches an exact canonical pack.
codes.remediation: Confirm formula, generation and pack evidence have no conflicts.

codes.message: SKU matches one existing retailer identity.
codes.remediation: Treat as supporting evidence; require stable external IDs.

codes.message: Brand, line, formula, generation, format and content match one canonical family.
codes.remediation: Resolve or propose the exact variant.

codes.message: Flavour evidence matches exactly after approved normalization.
codes.remediation: Retain raw and normalized evidence.

codes.message: Size value and unit match exactly.
codes.remediation: Retain normalized decimal string and raw source.

codes.message: Pack count and unit identity match exactly.
codes.remediation: Keep single-unit and multipack evidence distinct.

codes.message: Product format matches exactly after approved normalization.
codes.remediation: Retain raw and normalized format.

codes.message: Formula evidence is exact and non-conflicting.
codes.remediation: Record provenance.

codes.message: Generation/version evidence matches exactly.
codes.remediation: Record source and canonical generation.

codes.message: External product ID occurs in incompatible source families.
codes.remediation: Correct grouping or quarantine all conflicting rows.

codes.message: External variant ID is duplicated.
codes.remediation: Acquire a corrected snapshot.

codes.message: Nonblank SKU occurs more than once.
codes.remediation: Determine whether the SKU is shared intentionally or incorrect.

codes.message: GTIN occurs on multiple source identities.
codes.remediation: Verify exact commercial packs and source correctness.

codes.message: GTIN fails syntax or check digit validation.
codes.remediation: Correct or remove GTIN evidence; never match on it.

codes.message: SKU is shared across distinct variants or families.
codes.remediation: Use stable external variant IDs and review identity manually.

codes.message: GTIN is shared across materially different packs.
codes.remediation: Quarantine until authoritative evidence resolves the conflict.

codes.message: Variant URL maps to multiple source identities.
codes.remediation: Require exact variant-bound URLs.

codes.message: Canonical proposal key collides with another identity.
codes.remediation: Resolve canonical identity before plan building.

codes.message: Proposed slug belongs to another canonical identity.
codes.remediation: Resolve product identity; do not suffix automatically.

codes.message: More than one plausible canonical candidate remains.
codes.remediation: Reviewer must select or reject candidates with evidence.

codes.message: Joined source representations disagree on identity.
codes.remediation: Acquire corrected sources and rebuild snapshot.

codes.message: Source representations disagree on price.
codes.remediation: Refresh and freeze one authoritative observation.

codes.message: Source representations disagree on availability.
codes.remediation: Refresh sources and use the documented authority.

codes.message: Source representations disagree on image.
codes.remediation: Select exact provenance; no automatic canonical overwrite.

codes.message: Source schema fingerprint differs from the approved contract.
codes.remediation: Review adapter and freeze a new schema version.

codes.message: Source SKU is absent.
codes.remediation: Require stable external IDs and stronger pack evidence; enrich when possible.

codes.message: GTIN is absent or unavailable in this source.
codes.remediation: Enrich from CSV/feed; another closed identity may still support a reviewed plan.

codes.message: Flavour is required but absent.
codes.remediation: Obtain explicit option evidence.

codes.message: Size or count identity is absent.
codes.remediation: Enrich from authoritative source.

codes.message: Size is implausible for the product type.
codes.remediation: Verify net content versus shipping weight.

codes.message: Shopify grams is zero.
codes.remediation: Use explicit volume/count evidence or quarantine.

codes.message: Source weight differs from existing canonical identity.
codes.remediation: Treat as a new pack or verify source error.

codes.message: Formula differs from existing canonical identity.
codes.remediation: Create a separately reviewed product generation.

codes.message: Product generation/version changed.
codes.remediation: Create a separately reviewed canonical product.

codes.message: Stable source variant ID is missing.
codes.remediation: Use a source that exposes stable variant identity.

codes.message: A missing variant appears recreated with a new external ID.
codes.remediation: Verify continuity before rebinding mapping.

codes.message: Default source option may hide sellable variant evidence.
codes.remediation: Confirm product is genuinely single-variant.

codes.message: Multipack quantity or unit identity is unclear.
codes.remediation: Capture unit size and pack count separately.

codes.message: Single unit and multipack identities conflict.
codes.remediation: Separate canonical packs.

codes.message: Record is a bundle or stack.
codes.remediation: Defer until bundle policy exists.

codes.message: Record appears to be a sample.
codes.remediation: Apply sample policy and prevent full-pack matching.

codes.message: Record appears to be one bar rather than a box.
codes.remediation: Defer or match only to exact single-unit canonical identity.

codes.message: Category is excluded by retailer policy.
codes.remediation: Change policy only through reviewed config.

codes.message: Source variant is unavailable.
codes.remediation: Place in OOS queue; do not create initial offer.

codes.message: Source count fell below catastrophic threshold.
codes.remediation: Reject snapshot and investigate acquisition.

codes.message: OOS ratio or increase exceeds threshold.
codes.remediation: Reject apply and verify storefront/source health.

codes.message: Category is new or exceeds expected ratio.
codes.remediation: Review taxonomy and policy config.

codes.message: Family is designated manual-only.
codes.remediation: Use reviewed canonical workflow.

codes.message: Bundle is deferred in V1.
codes.remediation: No action in Phase 1.

codes.message: Single bar is deferred in V1.
codes.remediation: No action in Phase 1.

codes.message: Unresolved multipack is deferred in V1.
codes.remediation: Obtain exact pack evidence.

codes.message: Source snapshot exceeds freshness limit.
codes.remediation: Acquire and classify a fresh snapshot.

codes.message: Canonical snapshot exceeds freshness or current fingerprint differs.
codes.remediation: Build a fresh canonical snapshot and plan.

codes.message: Approval expired.
codes.remediation: Repeat preflight and issue a new approval.

codes.message: Artifact fingerprint does not match approved bytes.
codes.remediation: Reject and rebuild from trusted artifacts.

codes.message: Database state differs from the sealed plan.
codes.remediation: Stop, refresh canonical snapshot and replan.

codes.message: Required canonical or child dependency is not applied.
codes.remediation: Apply and validate dependency first.

codes.message: Child is not sealed by the approved parent.
codes.remediation: Reject child.

codes.message: Child plan fingerprint or manifest differs.
codes.remediation: Reject child and inspect artifact integrity.

codes.message: Consumed approval or applied child cannot be replayed.
codes.remediation: Treat verified applied state as noop or create a new plan for new state.

codes.message: Parent has committed and pending/failed children.
codes.remediation: Validate applied children and make an explicit resume/rollback decision.

codes.message: Rollback would affect data not exclusively owned by the plan.
codes.remediation: Use deactivation or manual reviewed restoration.
